docs.name: Moving Border
docs.description: SVG-path-tracing animated border that orbits a button or card.

props.name: theme
props.description: Visual theme; light or dark. Default: dark.

props.name: borderRadius
props.description: The radius for rounding the button edges and the orbiting path.

props.name: children
props.description: The label or content displayed inside the button.

props.name: as
props.description: The HTML element tag to use for the button wrapper (e.g., 'button', 'div').

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: Add CSS classes to the outermost container.

props.name: borderClassName
props.description: Add CSS classes directly to the moving animated SVG border.

props.name: duration
props.description: Time in milliseconds to complete one full orbit around the border.

props.name: className
props.description: Add CSS classes to the inner content layer.

docs.overview: MovingBorder traces an animated SVG path around a button or card, creating the appearance of a glowing line orbiting the element. The path speed and glow intensity are fully configurable.

scenarios.title: Highlighted CTA button
scenarios.description: Draw immediate attention to a primary action with an orbiting glow border.

scenarios.title: Featured pricing card
scenarios.description: Indicate the recommended pricing tier with a subtle moving border that stands out from static cards.
